summary: Applied ADR 0198 from a worktree rooted at origin/main commit e213cce2, switched platform-context retrieval to local Ollama-backed semantic embeddings, expanded the mirrored corpus, pulled `nomic-embed-text`, rebuilt the Qdrant index, and verified end-to-end vector retrieval through the managed converge plus operator query entrypoints.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with httpx --with fastapi --with qdrant-client python -m pytest tests/test_platform_context_corpus.py tests/test_platform_context_service.py tests/test_platform_llm_client.py tests/test_lv3_cli.py -q` passed with `59 passed in 1.84s`.

`make syntax-check-rag-context`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh data-models workstream-surfaces agent-standards`, and `uvx --from pyyaml python scripts/interface_contracts.py --check-live-apply service:rag-context` all passed on the workstream branch.

`make converge-rag-context` completed successfully with `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=92 changed=7 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=14` and `proxmox_florin : ok=36 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=14`; the managed run pulled `nomic-embed-text` into Ollama and rebuilt the remote corpus.

`PYTHONPATH=. uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/lv3_cli.py query-platform-context 'approval gates for risky changes' --json` returned cited results with `retrieval_backend: "vector"`, including `docs/runbooks/command-catalog-and-approval-gates.md`.

verification.check: Direct query wrapper and live API verification
verification.observed: `PYTHONPATH=. uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/query_platform_context.py --question 'certificate issuance policy' --top-k 3` returned `retrieval_backend: "vector"`; `curl -fsS http://100.64.0.1:8010/healthz` returned `{"status":"ok","collection":"platform_context"}`; and an authenticated `curl` to `/v1/context/query` returned `retrieval_backend: "vector"` with ADR 0198 as the top semantic match for `semantic retrieval rollout`.
A remote `curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags` on `docker-runtime-lv3` reported `['nomic-embed-text:latest']` after the converge.

notes: `make live-apply-service service=rag-context env=production` remained blocked by an inherited canonical-truth failure that wanted to rewrite protected `README.md` content on the branch, so the governed live mutation ran through `make converge-rag-context` after the interface-contract check succeeded.
Protected integration-file follow-up still belongs to merge-to-main: `README.md`, `VERSION`, release sections in `changelog.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml`.
